creator: arrowd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Regarding the 'examples' Meson option added by patches - I believe it'd be much simpler if we allow Meson to always install that file, but then optionally omit it from the package via the PORTEXAMPLES knob. This would allow us to remove 4 patches!

Regarding the "USE_GNOME=	glib20" addition - if I read meson.build correctly, it is only required for the "modular_tests" option. In this case it should be a TEST_DEPENDS.

The "patch-dbus_dbus-sysdeps-unix.c" patch simplification doesn't look correct to me. It changes the way _dbus_read_credentials_socket() work. In the new version of patch the 

#elif defined(__FreeBSD__)
    struct xucred cr;

part resides inside the #ifdef SO_PEERCRED block, which is always false on FreeBSD. "Our" thing is called LOCAL_PEERCRED, so we need to get back the #elif defined(LOCAL_PEERCRED) block from the old patch.
